data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Group seating (keep seats together)', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions that the system recommends adjacent seats first for group bookings, but it also allows split seating if the customer explicitly accepts it, which indicates a potential gap in fulfilling the requirement of keeping seats together. There is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms the implementation or validation of the group seating feature, leading to a conclusion that there is a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of group seating that keeps seats together.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for group seating
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the group seating requirement.
